mapper.select:
select job.id, algorithm.id AS algorithm_id, algorithm.name AS algorithm_name, job.job_status as jobStatus, dataset.id AS dataset_id, job.insert_user_id as insertUserId, job.insert_time as insertTime, job.update_time as updateTime, nc.id AS nc_id, nc.name AS nc_ncName, nc.title AS nc_title, nc.band_number AS nc_bandNumber, nc.nc_path AS nc_ncPath, nc.img_path AS nc_imgPath, nc.start_time AS nc_startTime, nc.end_time AS nc_endTime, ST_AsGeoJSON(nc.geometry) AS nc_ncGeometry, china.name AS nc_name, china.gb AS nc_gb, ST_AsGeoJSON(china.geometry) AS nc_geometry, nc.satellite_type AS nc_satelliteType, nc.resolution AS nc_resolution, nc.img_type AS nc_imgType, nc.process_type AS nc_processType from job LEFT JOIN algorithm ON job.fk_algorithm_id = algorithm.id LEFT JOIN dataset ON job.fk_dataset_id = dataset.id left JOIN nc_dataset ON dataset.id = nc_dataset.dataset_id left JOIN nc ON nc_dataset.nc_id = nc.id JOIN china ON ST_Contains(nc.geometry, china.geometry) dataset.del_flag = false and job.insert_user_id = #{user.userno}
order by job.id limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from job 1=1 and job.insert_user_id = #{user.userno}
mapper.insert: insert into job(fk_algorithm_id, fk_dataset_id, insert_user_id, insert_time, job_status) values(#{algorithm_id}, #{dataset_id}, #{user.userno}, now(), 'PEN')
mapper.update: update job set job_status = #{job_status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name from algorithm limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}
